SAM PATEL
QA Engineer | Bristol

PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY
Quality Assurance specialist with 3 years experience in test automation and manual testing.
Strong attention to detail and experience with testing frameworks.

EXPERIENCE

QA Engineer — SoftwareTesting Inc (2022–present)
- Wrote automated tests using Selenium and Cypress
- Performed manual regression testing on web applications
- Created test plans and documented test cases
- Worked with Jenkins for CI/CD test automation
- Collaborated with development teams on bug triage

QA Automation Technician — TestingCorp (2021–2022)
- Automated UI tests using Cypress
- Maintained test automation suites
- Reported and documented bugs in Azure DevOps
- Participated in agile ceremonies (standups, retros)

SKILLS
Languages: Python (for test automation), Gherkin (BDD)
Testing Frameworks: Selenium, Cypress, JUnit, pytest
Methodologies: Test-Driven Development, Behavior-Driven Development
Version Control: Git
Platforms: Windows, Linux
Tools: Azure DevOps, Jira, Postman

EDUCATION
Diploma in Software Testing, Tech Academy (2021)
Bachelor of Arts, General Studies, Open University (2019)
